user.title: Set up Chrono Folder
user.description: IMPORTANT: Photos must be placed inside the /config/www/ folder, for example /config/www/slideshow/vacation

data_description.label: A name to identify this folder watcher
data_description.folder: Enter the folder name relative to the www folder, e.g. /slideshow/vacation
data_description.filespec: File pattern(s) to match, separated by semicolons (e.g. \*.jpg; 2026\*.png). Default: \*.\*
data_description.max_photos: Specify the maximum number of photos to scan to prevent performance degradation.

error.invalid_folder: Folder does not exist or is not accessible under the www folder

init.title: Edit Chrono Folder
init.description: IMPORTANT: Photos must be placed inside the /config/www/ folder, for example /config/www/slideshow/vacation

data_description.label: A name to identify this folder watcher
data_description.folder: Enter the folder name relative to the www folder, e.g. /slideshow/vacation
data_description.filespec: File pattern(s) to match, separated by semicolons (e.g. \*.jpg; 2026\*.png). Default: \*.\*
data_description.max_photos: Specify the maximum number of photos to scan to prevent performance degradation.

error.invalid_folder: Folder does not exist or is not accessible under the www folder
